name: HCS - Ghost
description:
AnyPov

The Hybrid Coffee Shop isn’t just a café — it’s a safe haven.
Run by a sharp-eyed woman everyone calls the Boss, it’s a quiet little corner of the world where hybrids who’ve been hurt, abandoned, or cast aside can breathe again. They heal at their own pace, learning how to find their footing and rejoin a world that hasn’t always been kind.
